ddls:
CREATE TABLE "homes" (
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the home */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the home is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the home is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the home's location */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the home */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the home was built */,
  "num_occupants" INTEGER /* Number of occupants in the home */,
  "energy_provider" TEXT /* Name of the energy provider */,
  "current_plan" TEXT /* Current energy plan (e.g., standard, time-of-use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home the room belongs to */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room (e.g., Bedroom, Living Room) */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of the room (e.g., bedroom, living room, kitchen) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the room in square feet */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the room */,
  "insulation_quality" TEXT /* Quality of insulation (e.g., poor, average, good) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES homes ("home_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room the device is located in */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device (e.g., Thermostat, Light Bulb) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., temperature sensor, lighting) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "battery_life" INTEGER /* Battery life in days (if applicable) */,
  "is_smart" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device is smart (i.e., can be controlled via a smart home system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the reading is from */,
  "value" REAL /* Energy consumption value (e.g., watts, kWh) */,
  "timepoint" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the reading (e.g., minutes, hours) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., watts, kWh) */,
  "is_real_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reading is a real-time update */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reading (e.g., sensor, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home the user owns */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for notifications and alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES homes ("home_id")
)
